---
title: Notes on operations
---



It is noted that DAA crews (assumed helicopter only as opposed to critical care car?) are first on scene in ~10% of incidents, acacording to the 360 degree aircraft tour.

:::{.callout-note}
Confirm this and consider what, if any, way this affects assumptions in the model.
:::

Around 40% of calls responded to have a doctor on board.

:::{.callout-note}
Confirm this and consider what, if any, way this affects assumptions in the model.

How does this vary across resources and what determines it?
:::
